transactions: June 5, 1989:Drafted by theAtlanta Bravesin the27th roundof the 1989 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 3, 1993:Drafted by theCalifornia Angelsin the12th roundof the 1993 amateur draft. Player signed June 11, 1993.
April 10, 2000:Signed as a Free Agent with theToronto Blue Jays.
April 5, 2001:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
May 16, 2002:Signed as a Free Agent with theTexas Rangers.
December 22, 2003:Signed as a Free Agent with theColorado Rockies.
January 5, 2005:Signed as a Free Agent with theColorado Rockies.
January 5, 2006:Signed as a Free Agent with theSan Diego Padres.
February 10, 2006:Signed as a Free Agent with theSan Francisco Giants.
